prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-WHEAT-PIZZA-YJJ-74599-72-FBA Product Type: WHEEL_CUTTER Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille Cream Stainless Steel Wheat Straw Pizza Cutter Kitchen Utensil Home Goods Description: Calling all pizza lovers, swap your pizza cutter wheel for a sustainable one. And, whether you’re team deep dish or fancy flatbread, our pizza cutter will make the hand-to-mouth process a breeze, so you don’t have to worry about a mess of stringy cheese or worse, dropped toppings (gasp.)

Beille’s wheat straw pizza slicer features a thick, rounded handle with a speckled matte finish, ensuring a comfortable and controlled grip for cutting and slicing pizza. This pizza cutter wheel also features a built-in handle hole, allowing for hanging over the drawer or cupboard storage if preferred. In addition to slicing through pizza, the rolling blade can also be used to slice casseroles or lasagna, flatbreads, brownies, and other similar foods when called upon, like the superhero, multitasking kitchen tool that it is.

Beille’s pizza cutter wheel with handle is made from wheat straw; in short, an eco-friendly bioplastic. An alternative plant-based material to other less forgiving solid plastics, the material construction makes it a more sustainable choice; and of course, the pizza cutter is food-safe and certified BPA Free for your pizza cutting pleasure.

No kitchen is complete without a reliable pizza cutter. And while pizza stones, pizza ovens, and peels usually take the spotlight here, we’re making the case for a great pizza cutter in your favorite and overflowing kitchen utensils drawer. A must-have kitchen tool, upgrade your current grater to a sustainable one, or gift one as a hostess or housewarming gift with other items from Beille’s wheat straw kitchen collection.

Dishwasher safe. Search Terms: pizza cutter wheel wheat straw utensils baking supplies tools cooking chef restaurant equipment sustainable products bake food meal prep kitchen starter set wedding house warming gifts new home college dorm room essentials home goods kitchen Features: - PIZZA CUTTER - Calling all pizza lovers, swap your pizza cutter wheel for homemade or take-out pizza to a sustainable one! Beille’s wheat straw ice cream scooper features a thick, rounded handle with a speckled matte finish, ensuring a comfortable and controlled grip when cutting and slicing - WHEAT STRAW - Beille’s pizza cutter is made of bioplastic wheat straw, an alternative plant-based material to other less forgiving solid plastics; renewable and sustainable, Beille’s pizza cutter is food-safe and certified BPA Free; it also features a built-in handle hole for hanging storage if preferred - KITCHEN GADGETS - No kitchen is complete without a pizza cutter! A must-have home and kitchen tool, upgrade your current pizza cutter wheel to a sustainable one, or gift one as a hostess or housewarming gift alongside other items from Beille’s wheat straw kitchen collection - DISHWASHER SAFE - Beille wheat straw ice cream scoops mimic traditional plastic measuring tools without harmful byproducts, which makes them top rack dishwasher safe for a quick and easy cleanup! - SPECIFICATIONS - Materials: bioplastic wheat straw (sustainable), stainless steel; Colors: beige/cream, black; BPA Free: yes === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille Cream Wheat Straw Pizza Cutter Wheel

anthropic.title_differentiation: Sustainable Bioplastic, Stainless Steel Blade, BPA-Free, Dishwasher Safe, Ergonomic Handle

openai.title_differentiation: Wheat Straw Construction, BPA Free, Stainless Steel Blade, Dishwasher Safe, Hanging Hole
